title: MICRO ENTERPRISE - 211info
text: NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER MICRO ENTERPRISE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides technical assistance, training in business skills, assistance writing business plans, access to financial business counseling, individual development accounts (IDAs), and other support for individuals who want to establish a small business. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Individuals who self-identify as tribal members Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 288-8177 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 288-8177 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Portland TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 75 Services: Business Development * Native American Community Financial Literacy Training * Native American Community Individual Development Accounts * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS -
